texto: She thought of all the words that went unspoken in the world, throughout time: what happened to them, where did they go? What would happen if they were all spoken? How different would the world be then?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Livi Michael que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “She thought of all the words that went unspoken in the world, throughout time: what happened to t…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, words, world, com foco em reflexao.
